# Purpose
The file includes a directive to embed the contents of a BSD-3-Clause License from an external file located at `../LICENSE.txt`. The `.. literalinclude::` directive is used to include the license text as a literal block in the documentation, ensuring that the license is displayed exactly as it appears in the source file. The `:language: text` option specifies that the included content should be treated as plain text.
